REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1940 Oakdale Avenue, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Oct-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner for and with Timothy Banks.

There being no overbids, the sale was confirmed at $1,075,000.00. All proceeds in excess of $300,000.00 are to be placed in a blocked account. An additional bond of $300,000.00 is required.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (1940 Oakdale Avenue, San Francisco)
Off Calendar Sep-13-2010 Continued To Oct-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Conrad Donner for and with Timothy Banks. Jack Peterson representing Buyers.

The Court stated that there were a number of issues with the petition and explained said issues to Counsel. The matter was continued to October 4, 2010 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for republishing and for filing of the amended petition.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.
